sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ الصِّحَّةُ النَّفْسِيَّةُ جُزْءًا لَا يَتَجَزَّأُ مِنَ الْعَافِيَةِ الشَّامِلَةِ لِلْإِنْسَانِ فِي عَصْرِنَا الْحَدِيثِ.
sentences.translation: Mentalno zdravlje predstavlja neraskidiv dio općeg blagostanja čovjeka u našem modernom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: Mental health represents an integral part of human overall well-being in our modern era.

sentences.arabic: فَالتَّوَتُّرُ الْمُسْتَمِرُّ وَضُغُوطُ الْعَمَلِ قَدْ يُؤَدِّيَانِ إِلَى مَشَاكِلَ صِحِّيَّةٍ جَسَدِيَّةٍ إِذَا لَمْ يَتِمَّ التَّعَامُلُ مَعَهُمَا بِحِكْمَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Kontinuirani stres i pritisci na poslu mogu dovesti do fizičkih zdravstvenih problema ako se s njima ne postupa mudro.
sentences.translationEn: Constant stress and work pressure may lead to physical health problems if not dealt with wisely.

sentences.arabic: لِذَا، مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ مُمَارَسَةُ تَمَارِينِ التَّأَمُّلِ وَالِاسْتِرْخَاءِ لِتَهْدِئَةِ الْجِهَازِ الْعَصَبِيِّ وَتَقْلِيلِ حِدَّةِ الْقَلَقِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga je neophodno praktikovati vježbe meditacije i opuštanja kako bi se umirio nervni sistem i smanjio intenzitet anksioznosti.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, it is necessary to practice meditation and relaxation exercises to calm the nervous system and reduce the intensity of anxiety.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا أَنَّ الْحُصُولَ عَلَى قِسْطٍ كَافٍ مِنَ النَّوْمِ الْعَمِيقِ يُسَاعِدُ الدِّمَاغَ عَلَى مُعَالَجَةِ الْمَشَاعِرِ وَتَجْدِيدِ النَّشَاطِ.
sentences.translation: Također, dobijanje dovoljno dubokog sna pomaže mozgu da obradi emocije i obnovi energiju.
sentences.translationEn: Also, getting enough deep sleep helps the brain process emotions and renew energy.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَلَّا نَتَرَدَّدَ فِي طَلَبِ الدَّعْمِ مِنَ الْمُخْتَصِّينَ عِنْدَ الشُّعُورِ بِالْإِرْهَاقِ النَّفْسِيِّ لِضَمَانِ الِاسْتِقْرَارِ الْعَاطِفِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ne smijemo oklijevati u traženju podrške od stručnjaka kada osjetimo psihičku iscrpljenost kako bismo osigurali emocionalnu stabilnost.
sentences.translationEn: We must not hesitate to seek support from specialists when feeling psychological exhaustion to ensure emotional stability.
